A special thank you to Siobhán Mc Feeney for recruiting me and consistently raising the bar with her leadership, and to Matthew Wudy , Dino Cicciarelli , and Andres Tellez for their partnership. Most importantly, to the teams I had the privilege of leading, you inspired me every day and made me a better leader and a better human. Learning retail during one of its most disruptive periods has been an invaluable experience. It also leaves me optimistic about the future. The rise of AI and more scientific decision-making will bring retailers even closer to the customer and unlock more intelligent, value driven engagement/operating models. Wishing everyone at Kohl’s continued success. Always forward.
